app.title: Web Agents
app.subtitle: Insert tasks into the current web AI page, connect local MCP, and grow into multi-model workflows.
task.title: Task Entry
task.placeholder: Write a task for the current web AI page...
task.manualSend: Auto-send is off by default. Review and send from the webpage.
current.title: Current Page
mcp.title: Local MCP
permission.title: Permission Summary
permission.standardHelp: Outside-root read/browse is allowed; write, delete, and move actions require confirmation.
permission.enforcementNotice: This is currently a plugin UI contract. Real enforcement needs the local gateway.
board.title: Multi-model Board
board.currentOnly: Only the current page participates by default. Select and open other providers manually.
board.opened: Child page opened. Wait for the page to load before inserting.
board.openFirst: Open or bind this provider page first.
settings.title: Settings
settings.advancedNotice: Auto-send remains off. High privilege can only be enabled manually in local config or gateway.
